PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>

PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?founder
WHERE
  { wd:Q860580  wdt:P112  ?founder .
    ?founder  wdt:P39     ?position .
    ?position  rdfs:label  ?positionLabel
    FILTER ( lang(?positionLabel) = "en" )
    FILTER contains(lcase(?positionLabel), "national people's congress")
  }

question: has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
sparql:
PREFIX  schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q794   p:P2250   ?statement1 .
    ?statement1  ps:P2250  ?lifeExp1 ;
              pq:P585   ?time1
    FILTER ( year(?time1) > 1999 )
    wd:Q794   p:P2250   ?statement2 .
    ?statement2  ps:P2250  ?lifeExp2 ;
              pq:P585   ?time2
    FILTER ( year(?time2) > 1999 )
    FILTER ( ?time2 > ?time1 )
    FILTER ( ?lifeExp2 > ?lifeExp1 )
  }

PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q42053  p:P1082  ?popStatement1 .
    ?popStatement1
              ps:P1082  ?popValue1 ;
              pq:P585   ?date1
    FILTER ( ?date1 > "2006-12-31T23:59:59Z"^^xsd:dateTime )
    wd:Q42053  p:P1082  ?popStatement2 .
    ?popStatement2
              ps:P1082  ?popValue2 ;
              pq:P585   ?date2
    FILTER ( ?date2 > "2006-12-31T23:59:59Z"^^xsd:dateTime )
    FILTER ( ?date2 > ?date1 )
    FILTER ( ?popValue2 > ?popValue1 )
  }

PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>

PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?cityState) AS ?count)
WHERE
  { ?cityState  wdt:P31  wd:Q133442
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?cityState  p:P576  ?dissolvedStatement .
                        ?dissolvedStatement
                                  ps:P576  ?dissolvedDate
                        FILTER ( ?dissolvedDate <= now() )
                      }
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?cityState  p:P582  ?endTimeStatement .
                        ?endTimeStatement
                                  ps:P582  ?endTimeDate
                        FILTER ( ?endTimeDate <= now() )
                      }
  }

LIMIT   1

question: Is the number of countries in Europe larger than that in Asia?
sparql:
PREFIX  schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { { SELECT  (COUNT(?countryEurope) AS ?countEurope)
      WHERE
        { ?countryEurope
                    wdt:P31  wd:Q6256 ;
                    wdt:P30  wd:Q46
        }
    }
    { SELECT  (COUNT(?countryAsia) AS ?countAsia)
      WHERE
        { ?countryAsia  wdt:P31  wd:Q6256 ;
                    wdt:P30  wd:Q48
        }
    }
    FILTER ( ?countEurope > ?countAsia )
  }

SELECT  (SUM(?revenue) AS ?combinedTotalRevenue)
WHERE
  { VALUES ?company { wd:Q312 wd:Q2283 wd:Q3884 wd:Q20800404 wd:Q38076 }

              wdt:P2139  ?revenue
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
LIMIT   3

  }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

ASK
WHERE
  { wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatement2010 .
    ?popStatement2010
              ps:P1082  ?pop2010 ;
              pq:P585   ?time2010
    FILTER ( year(?time2010) = 2010 )
    wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatementLatest .
    ?popStatementLatest
              ps:P1082  ?popLatest ;
              pq:P585   ?timeLatest
    FILTER ( year(?timeLatest) > 2010 )
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { wd:Q183   p:P1082   ?popStatementOther .
                        ?popStatementOther
                                  ps:P1082  ?popOther ;
                                  pq:P585   ?timeOther
                        FILTER ( year(?timeOther) > year(?timeLatest) )
                      }
    FILTER ( ( ( ?popLatest - ?pop2010 ) / ?pop2010 ) >= 0.01 )
  }

        { ?movie  wdt:P161  ?actor
          FILTER ( ?actor IN (wd:Q166389, wd:Q343616) )

      GROUP BY ?actor
    }

LIMIT   1

  }

SELECT  ?olderPerson

  { wd:Q42311  wdt:P569  ?birthDateVettel .
    wd:Q9673  wdt:P569  ?birthDateHamilton
      { BIND(wd:Q42311 AS ?olderPerson)

      }

PREFIX  pq:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX  pr:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX  ps:   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX  wds:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/>
PREFIX  wdv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/value/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX  psn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  pqn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  wd:   <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX  psv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX  dct:  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX  pqv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/value/>
PREFIX  prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX  wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX  prn:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value-normalized/>
PREFIX  p:    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX  wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX  prv:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/value/>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  wdno: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/novalue/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE
  { VALUES ?lake { wd:Q4127 }
      { ?lake  wdt:P17  ?country }
    UNION
      { ?lake  wdt:P205  ?country }
  }
